name: Aberdeen Bazaar
description: The bustling heart of Port Blair — a vibrant street market offering local seafood, Andamanese handicrafts, shells, jewelry, and spices. The best place to experience authentic island life.
history: Established during the British colonial era as the main commercial district of Port Blair, it has grown organically over 150 years.
famousFor: Local crafts, fresh seafood, shell souvenirs
